source.title: From Prediction to Action: Dissociable Roles of Ventral Tegmental Area and Substantia Nigra Dopamine Neurons in Instrumental Reinforcement

confidence_rationale: Optogenetic dissociation directly contrasts VTA vs SNc dopamine neurons in instrumental reinforcement using multiple behavioral tasks in the same study. VTA dopamine imbues flexible, persistent, goal-directed motivational value; SNc dopamine supports time-limited, inflexible, action-specific habit-like learning. This is the cleanest available empirical dissociation of the SNc/dorsal-striatum vs VTA/ventral-striatum axis central to MECH-163. High source quality; mapping fidelity high for the dopaminergic dissociation component.
failure_signatures: VTA dopamine activation sufficient for flexible motivational value attribution
SNc dopamine activation produces non-scalable, action-specific S-R reinforcement
only VTA (not SNc) imbues cues with persistent pursuit value

mapping.source_claim_statement: VTA dopamine neurons imbue actions and associated cues with motivational value enabling flexible and persistent pursuit (goal-directed), whereas SNc dopamine neurons support time-limited, precise, action-specific non-scalable and inflexible learning (habit-like). This parallels an actor-critic RL architecture with VTA as critic and SNc as actor.
mapping.ree_translation: MECH-163 specifies SNc/dorsal-striatum as the habit (model-free, S-R) system and VTA/ventral-striatum as the goal-directed (model-based) system. Fraser et al. directly validate this anatomical dissociation at the level of dopamine neuron subtypes: VTA DA -> motivational/goal-directed value, SNc DA -> rigid action-specific habit learning. The actor-critic framing is compatible with MECH-163's parallel systems architecture. This is the strongest available empirical support for the dopaminergic half of MECH-163.
mapping.mapping_caveat: Study examines instrumental (not prosocial) reinforcement and does not test novel-environment planning or long-horizon accumulation. The 'model-based vs model-free' framing is implicit in flexibility/inflexibility measures rather than explicit tree-search planning. The hippocampal component of MECH-163's goal-directed system is not addressed.
mapping.source_context: Multi-task rat study using time-limited optogenetic activation of VTA vs SNc dopamine neurons. Manipulations include cue conditioning, action learning, and persistence/flexibility probes. Male and female rats included. JHU and UCSB groups; published J. Neurosci. 2023.

confidence_components.notes: High-quality optogenetic design with multiple converging tasks. Mapping fidelity very high for the VTA/SNc dissociation core of MECH-163. Transfer risk low: the same dopaminergic anatomy applies in humans. Does not cover long-horizon or novel-context aspects of MECH-163.
